violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-Cooler was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. Using towels as a catch all for dishes under drain rack. Remove towels and use more drain racks.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Sani Bucket was being stored in Handwashing sink. Removed.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
